landing.title: Start a new Circle
landing.subtitle:
Create a trusted savings group with family or friends.
Simple, transparent, and secure.
landing.planNote: Free plan: 1 open circle at a time (setup or active). Complete a circle to free your slot, or upgrade for unlimited circles.
landing.limitMessage: The free plan allows one open circle at a time. Complete your open circle or upgrade for unlimited circles.
landing.note: Free: 1 open circle · Up to 20 members · Takes about 2 minutes

draft.resumeBody: You were in the middle of setting up “{{circleName}}”. Would you like to continue where you left off?

basics.nameQuestion: What should we call this circle?
basics.description: A savings circle is a trusted group where each active hand contributes and takes turns receiving the full pot.

amount.question: How much will each hand contribute?
amount.description: Each active hand contributes this amount every round.

organizer.question: Will you contribute and receive a payout in this circle?
organizer.participateBody: You will contribute every round and receive a payout.
organizer.organizeOnlyBody: You will manage the circle without contributing or receiving a payout.
organizer.handExplanation: You start with Hand 1. Payout position is set later after members claim spots and any additional hands are approved. You can request more hands from the circle People tab during setup.

members.title: Add other people
members.description: Do not add yourself here. Your participation is set on the previous step. Each person starts with Hand 1.
members.emptyParticipating: Add at least 1 other person so the circle has 2 hands.
members.emptyOrganizingOnly: Add at least 2 people (you are organizing only).

schedule.question: How often should contributions happen?
schedule.description: This schedule is saved with the circle. Payout order is completed after creation.
schedule.payoutDeferred: Payout order will be finalized after members claim their spots and any additional hands are approved.

review.title: Review draft circle
review.description: This creates a draft only. You will not start the circle yet.
review.organizingOnlyNote: You are organizing only and are not counted in people, hands, pot size, or rounds.

confirmation.title: Create this circle?
confirmation.body: Your circle will be created as a draft so you can invite members, handle claims, and approve additional hands. Payout order and Start Circle come later — not in this step.
confirmation.warningBody: Creating the circle does not start it or finalize payout order. Continue setup on the People tab after creation.

success.title: Draft circle created
success.body: Your circle is ready for setup. Invite members, review claims and additional hands, then finalize payout order before starting.

errors.memberNameBody: Enter the member first and last name.
errors.memberPhoneBody: Enter a phone number for this member.
errors.organizerDuplicateBody: You are already the organizer. Choose your participation on the previous step instead of adding yourself as a member.
errors.circleNameBody: Please give your circle a name.
errors.signInBody: Your session is missing an access token.
errors.openCircleLimitBody: The free plan allows one open circle at a time. Continue your existing circle or upgrade to Premium.
errors.createFailedBody: The circle could not be created. Please try again.

validation.minimumHandsParticipating: Add at least 1 other member so the circle has 2 hands.
validation.minimumHandsOrganizingOnly: Add at least 2 members (you are organizing only).
validation.premiumCapacity: Premium circles support up to {{count}} participating hands.
validation.freeCapacity: Free circles support up to {{count}} participating hands. Upgrade to Premium for up to {{premiumCount}}.
